# kQLPreviewPDFStandardStyle

**Global Variable**

The PDF appears in the operating system’s standard style.

## Declaration

```swift
var kQLPreviewPDFStandardStyle: QLPreviewPDFStyle { get }
```

## Styles for PDF Previews

- **kQLPreviewPDFPagesWithThumbnailsOnLeftStyle**: The content of the PDF appears with thumbnails of all pages on the left side of the current page’s content.
- **kQLPreviewPDFPagesWithThumbnailsOnRightStyle**: The content of the PDF appears with thumbnails of all pages on the right side of the current page’s content.
